purpose: COS.Lending.Selling.Hooks provides a centralized notification service for loan selling operations in the COS Lending system. It processes various business events related to loan sales and investor activities, transforming them into standardized messages and publishing them to downstream systems through a hooks pattern.

apis.purpose: Health check endpoint for service monitoring
Accepts various notification types and publishes them as standardized events

dataEntities.name: LoanSaleStatusChanged
dataEntities.description: Represents a change in loan sale status including loan information and sale details

dataEntities.name: BatchPurchaseCompleted
dataEntities.description: Represents a completed batch purchase transaction with financial details and metrics

dataEntities.name: TrueUpVolumeFeeCharged
dataEntities.description: Represents volume fee adjustments charged to loans on a periodic basis

dataEntities.name: InvestorChanged
dataEntities.description: Represents a change in the investor associated with a loan

dataEntities.name: LoanTypeChanged
dataEntities.description: Represents a change in loan type classification

dataEntities.name: OverdueLoansAlert
dataEntities.description: Represents metrics about overdue loans requiring attention

messagingPatterns.name: LoanSaleStatusUpdated
messagingPatterns.description: Published when a loan's sale status is updated

messagingPatterns.name: BatchPurchaseCompleted
messagingPatterns.description: Published when a batch purchase transaction is completed

messagingPatterns.name: TrueUpVolumeFeeCharged
messagingPatterns.description: Published when a true-up volume fee is charged

messagingPatterns.name: LoanTypeChanged
messagingPatterns.description: Published when a loan's type classification changes

messagingPatterns.name: InvestorChanged
messagingPatterns.description: Published when a loan's investor assignment changes

messagingPatterns.name: OverdueLoansAlert
messagingPatterns.description: Published when metrics about overdue loans need to be reported

findings.title: Sensitive configuration in appsettings files
findings.description: The application contains sensitive configuration information in appsettings files, with a note that TransportConnectionString is 'taken from aws secrets manager', but the code doesn't show proper secrets management implementation. This could lead to credential leakage. Implement proper secret management using AWS Secrets Manager or similar service.

findings.title: Lack of input validation
findings.description: The NotificationPublisher accepts notification objects without validating their content before publishing them as events. This could lead to data integrity issues or system errors downstream. Implement input validation for all notification types.
